case_title: ESTHER FERNANDEZ VS. JABAR REDMON et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2008 BY PRO TEM COMMISSIONER MARK SCHREIBER. DEFENDANTS' TERESA VELASCO AND JABAR REDMAN WAIVED SERVICE. CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.40 FILED BY FERNANDEZ, ESTHER AS TO DEFENDANT REDMON, JABAR VELASCO, ARIANA VELASCO, TERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERNANDEZ, ESTHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REDMON, JABAR VELASCO, ARIANA VELASCO, TERESA $399.53 PRINCIPAL, $116.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.53, DEFENDANTS, ARIANA VELASCO, JABAR REDMAN, AND TERESA VELASCO JOINTLY AND SEVERLLY, SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF ESTHER FERNANDEZ. DEFENDANTS, JABAR REDMAN AND TERESA VELASCO WAIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SHERIFF'S DECLARATION: DILIGENCE... ON JABAR REDMON.
SHERIFF'S DECLARATION: DILIGENCE... ON TERESA VELASCO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED AUG-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, ARIANA
